notifications.title: Surface Hinge Assembly Final Trials Target Date closing by
notifications.message: Surface Hinge Assembly Equipment trials should start at June 8th and should run without alarms and stoppage.
notifications.author: Admin

notifications.title: Fail Safe and Safety Interlock
notifications.message: 3A-TC1-26039_TE_46P and 6P Assembly can be made as a benchmark project for Safety adoption.  All engineers are welcome to provide their idea and suggestions.
notifications.author: Admin

notifications.title: Performance Evaluation
notifications.message: Update basic details and send the file on or before 08-06-2026
notifications.author: Admin

notifications.title: Mail id for Site Visit Advance, Settlement and Approvals
notifications.message: Employee advances, advance settlements, related approvals, Employee reimbursement claims, supporting documents, and payment status follow-ups related mails should be sent to 3dcadpayable@3dcad-global.com
notifications.author: Admin

notifications.title: Last Date for sending list of Completed Projects for 2025-26 Perf. Evaluation
notifications.message:
Send list of projects completed, Accomplishments in 2025-36
in Excel Sheet by 15th June without fail.
notifications.author: Admin

notifications.title: Surface Hinge Assembly F.A.T from 16_06_2026
notifications.message:
Surface Hinge Assembly Equipment F.A.T starts from June 15th.
Line is expected to run without stoppage and alarms for 1 hour.
Equipment should meet F.A.T points shared by customer.
notifications.author: Admin

notifications.title: Project Assignment Post
notifications.message: Enter the details and post the excel sheet in Teams. Excel file name should be of Project Name. Save draft just in case to restore filled data before creating excel sheet.
notifications.author: Admin
